title: adonis aestivalis var. squarrosa
intro: Adonis aestivalis var. squarrosa, commonly known as the squarrose adonis or red hellebore, is a plant species within the genus Adonis that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adonis aestivalis var. squarrosa include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and treating skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Adonis aestivalis var. squarrosa can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies.
